# Zaraz

Run third-party tools and services on the cloud for improved speed and security

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Cloudflare Zaraz](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/index.md): Load third-party tools in the cloud for speed, privacy, and security.

## Get started

- [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/get-started/index.md): Set up Cloudflare Zaraz to manage third-party tools from the dashboard.

## Custom actions

- [Custom actions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/custom-actions/index.md): Configure custom actions and triggers for third-party tools.
- [Additional fields](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/custom-actions/additional-fields/index.md): Additional fields available in Zaraz custom actions.
- [Create an action](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/custom-actions/create-action/index.md): Create a custom action to send data to third-party tools.
- [Create a trigger](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/custom-actions/create-trigger/index.md): Create triggers that fire actions based on page events.
- [Edit tools and actions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/custom-actions/edit-tools-and-actions/index.md): Edit existing Zaraz tools and actions.
- [Edit triggers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/custom-actions/edit-triggers/index.md): Edit existing Zaraz triggers.

## Web API

- [Web API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/web-api/index.md): Interact with Zaraz from client-side JavaScript.
- [Debug mode](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/web-api/debug-mode/index.md): Enable Zaraz debug mode to inspect events in the browser console.
- [E-commerce](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/web-api/ecommerce/index.md): Send e-commerce events like purchases and cart updates through Zaraz.
- [Set](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/web-api/set/index.md): Set key-value pairs in the Zaraz data layer.
- [Track](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/web-api/track/index.md): Send custom tracking events with the Zaraz Web API.

## HTTP Events API

- [HTTP Events API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/http-events-api/index.md): Send server-side events to Zaraz with the HTTP Events API.

## Consent management

- [Consent management](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/consent-management/index.md): Manage visitor consent for third-party tools with Zaraz.
- [Consent API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/consent-management/api/index.md): Control consent programmatically with the Zaraz Consent API.
- [Custom CSS](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/consent-management/custom-css/index.md): Customize the consent modal appearance with CSS.
- [Enable Consent Management](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/consent-management/enable-consent-management/index.md): Enable and configure Zaraz Consent Management.
- [IAB TCF Compliance](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/consent-management/iab-tcf-compliance/index.md): Configure IAB TCF compliance for Zaraz consent.

## Embeds

- [Embeds](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/embeds/index.md): Embed third-party widgets like chat and support tools with Zaraz.

## Monitoring

- [Monitoring](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/monitoring/index.md): Monitor Zaraz tool loading and event delivery.
- [Monitoring API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/monitoring/monitoring-api/index.md): Query Zaraz monitoring data with the GraphQL API.

## Versions & History

- [Versions & History](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/history/index.md): Manage Zaraz configuration versions and history.
- [Preview mode](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/history/preview-mode/index.md): Preview Zaraz configuration changes before publishing.
- [Versions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/history/versions/index.md): View and restore previous Zaraz configuration versions.

## FAQ

- [FAQ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/faq/index.md): Answers to common questions about Cloudflare Zaraz.

## Changelog

- [Changelog](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/changelog/index.md): Track the latest updates and changes to Cloudflare Zaraz.

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/pricing-info/index.md): Zaraz pricing tiers and included event volumes.

## advanced

- [Blocking Triggers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/blocking-triggers/index.md): Prevent triggers from firing under specific conditions.
- [Context Enricher](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/context-enricher/index.md): Enrich event context with server-side data using Workers.
- [Data layer compatibility mode](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/datalayer-compatibility/index.md): Use existing data layer calls with Zaraz compatibility mode.
- [Domains not proxied by Cloudflare](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/domains-not-proxied/index.md): Use Zaraz on domains not proxied by Cloudflare.
- [Google Consent Mode](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/google-consent-mode/index.md): Integrate Google Consent Mode with Zaraz consent management.
- [Configuration Import & Export](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/import-export/index.md): Import and export Zaraz configurations between zones.
- [Custom Managed Components](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/load-custom-managed-component/index.md): Load custom Managed Components in Zaraz.
- [Load Zaraz selectively](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/load-selectively/index.md): Load Zaraz only on specific pages or for specific visitors.
- [Load Zaraz manually](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/load-zaraz-manually/index.md): Control when Zaraz loads on your pages.
- [Send Zaraz logs to Logpush](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/logpush/index.md): Send Zaraz event logs to Logpush destinations.
- [Using JSONata](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/advanced/using-jsonata/index.md): Transform and filter event data with JSONata expressions in Zaraz.

## reference

- [Zaraz Context](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/reference/context/index.md): Data available in the Zaraz context object for triggers and actions.
- [Properties reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/reference/properties-reference/index.md): Built-in properties available in Zaraz events.
- [Settings](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/reference/settings/index.md): Global Zaraz configuration settings.
- [Third-party tools](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/reference/supported-tools/index.md): Third-party tools with native Zaraz integrations.
- [Triggers and rules](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/reference/triggers/index.md): Trigger types and matching rules for Zaraz actions.

## variables

- [Create a variable](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/variables/create-variables/index.md): Create custom variables for use in Zaraz actions.
- [Edit variables](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/variables/edit-variables/index.md): Edit existing Zaraz variables.
- [Worker Variables](https://developers.cloudflare.com/zaraz/variables/worker-variables/index.md): Create server-side variables using Workers for use in Zaraz actions.
